episodes.title: The Hideout
episodes.description: Six neighborhood kids discover a hidden treehouse with a door that goes somewhere impossible.

episodes.title: Portal Pals
episodes.description: On the other side of the door: a miniature world where they're the giants.

episodes.title: The Map
episodes.description: A hand-drawn map left in the treehouse hints at dozens of unexplored regions.

episodes.title: Lost & Found
episodes.description: A missing neighborhood cat turns up on the other side — and it can talk now.

episodes.title: The Clockwork Forest
episodes.description: A forest where every tree is a different kind of mechanical clock.

episodes.title: Giants in the Sky
episodes.description: The sky-region is inhabited by creatures that look like clouds and act like whales.

episodes.title: Mud Season
episodes.description: A seasonal event in the small world causes all paths to become impassable.

episodes.title: The Inventor's Guild
episodes.description: A community of tiny inventors needs help completing a machine no one understands.

episodes.title: Storm Season
episodes.description: A dangerous weather pattern on both sides of the door simultaneously.

episodes.title: The Collector
episodes.description: Someone is taking items from both worlds — and leaving nothing behind.

episodes.title: Convergence
episodes.description: The two worlds begin to overlap, and not just through the door.

episodes.title: Separate Ways
episodes.description: The kids must decide whether to close the door forever to protect both worlds.

episodes.title: The Return
episodes.description: The door reopens — and this time, the small world comes looking for help.

episodes.title: New Faces
episodes.description: Two new kids in the neighborhood discover the treehouse on their own.

episodes.title: The Archive
episodes.description: A small-world library holds records of the door going back centuries.

episodes.title: Tidewater
episodes.description: An underwater region of the small world is flooding into the terrestrial zones.

episodes.title: The Mechanic
episodes.description: A legendary small-world engineer might be the only one who can fix the problem.

episodes.title: Parallel Lines
episodes.description: Events in the neighborhood start mirroring things happening in the small world.

episodes.title: Trade Winds
episodes.description: A diplomatic mission between two small-world factions requires human help.

episodes.title: The Long Way Home
episodes.description: A shortcut through an uncharted region leads the kids far from the door.

episodes.title: Assembly
episodes.description: Both worlds work together to address the flooding — and learn what's causing it.

episodes.title: Open Door
episodes.description: A hopeful season finale — the door stays open, and an exchange program begins.

extras.title: Behind the Animation
extras.description: Animator walkthrough of the small world's design language.

extras.title: Voice Cast Q&A
extras.description: The voice actors discuss their characters and recording process.
